author: bongho
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Find and replace text using regular expressions with real-time preview and match highlighting.

manifest.author: bongho
manifest.description: Find and replace text using regular expressions with real-time preview and match highlighting.
manifest.name: Regex Replace

name: Regex Replace

releases.author: bongho
releases.description:
## Initial Release

### Features
- Regex find and replace with capture group support ($1, $2)
- Real-time match highlighting
- Preview before/after changes
- Regex flags toggle (g, i, m)
- Selection-only mode
- Pattern history
- Support for escape sequences (\n, \t, \r) in replacement
